projects.title: FirstDevJob
projects.description: Open-source job board helping developers land their first role in tech. Features job search with role-level and location filtering, application tracking dashboard, job posting with admin approval, and role-based access control. Fully documented with a dedicated /docs site.

projects.title: OKU
projects.description: Terminal companion for Hardcover that lets you track what you're reading, update progress, and manage shelves without leaving the terminal. Offers both a scriptable CLI and a full interactive TUI dashboard, with local SQLite caching and Hardcover GraphQL API integration.

projects.title: Group Dinner Picker
projects.description: Collaborative restaurant voting platform with a retro terminal UI and Spring Boot API enforcing fair voting, locking, and live stats across web clients.

projects.title: CE Equipment Solutions
projects.description: Professional B2B website for Ireland's leading CE marking consultancy. Built with Astro 5.9, React 19, and TypeScript featuring GDPR-compliant cookie system, dynamic service routing, and advanced lead generation.

projects.title: ARC Management Systems
projects.description: High-performance ISO certification consultancy website with advanced contact forms, performance optimization, and SEO. Features TypeScript throughout, WebP optimization, and Netlify integration with 95+ Lighthouse scores.

projects.title: A Class Barbers
projects.description: A modern website for a barbershop, featuring online booking and service showcase. Static site with Google Places API integration, Google Maps embed, and responsive design optimized for local business.

projects.title: This Personal Website
projects.description: Personal website built with Astro.js, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript. Features blog system, contact forms, responsive design, and performance optimization with WebP images.
